ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the product */,
  "total_stock" INTEGER /* Total stock available for the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level required for reordering */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to be reordered when stock falls below the reorder level */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the product (e.g., Available, Limited, No Stock) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "warranty_period" INTEGER /* Warranty period for the product in months */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., TVs, Computers, Accessories) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand (e.g., Mi, Thomson, HP) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the brand */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact name for the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the supplier */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the supplier */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchase_orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase order */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier the order is placed with */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Delivered, Cancelled) */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Payment terms for the order (e.g., Net 30, Net 60) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchase_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purchase order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_cost" TEXT /* Unit cost of the product */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the product (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES purchase_orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the sale (e.g., Cash, Credit Card) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sale_items" (
  "sale_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale item */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sale_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sale_items_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales staff, inventory manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., sales staff, inventory manager, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_products, edit_products, delete_products) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., stock_in, stock_out) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product involved in the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
